blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,100 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
